scripts.backendRubyOnRails: cd backendRubyOnRails && concurrently --names "Api_gateway,Categories,Games" --prefix-colors "red,yellow,blue," "cd api_gateway && rails server" "cd categories && rails server" "cd games && rails server"
scripts.backendGo: cd backendGo && concurrently --names "Api_gateway,Games" --prefix-colors "red,blue" "cd api_gateway && air " "cd games && air"
